title: 15mm Deep Purple Satin Ribbon 22M ，Fabric Hair String Ribbon for Craft, Flower Bouquets, Gift Wrapping, Wedding, Bow Making and Valentines Christmas Decoration (Deep Purple, 1.5CM)
features: The Size You Want： Each roll of Deep purple ribbon is 15mm (≈0.6 in) in width and 22m (≈25 yards) in length. It's a smooth surface ribbon made of high-quality single-sided polyester fabric and one side is full of luster.

There are Multiple colors optional, every color is very bright， it can meet your needs for different occasions. Easy To Use: The ribbon is easy to trim and shape. You can trim it to different lengths as needed, the ribbon is flexible and can be cut, folded, twisted, or tied into various shapes and designs, it's the best choice for DIY project

Suitable for The Scene：These beautiful ribbons are suitable for many scenes, such as birthday parties, weddings, anniversary parties, Easter, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas，Gender Reveal Party, Family Gatherings,Show, Exhibition and other events and holiday decorations. It can create a good atmosphere for your activities and festivals and increase the sense of ceremony.

Wide Applications: Tonal ribbon bags are perfect for wedding invitations, bridal bouquets, rugs, bodice lace, gift wrapping, hairpins, buns, bouquets, party favors, trimming, cutting, dancers ribbon sticks, corset lace art and sewing, Handcrafts, jewelry making, ribbons, scarves, arts and crafts, hanging decorations, wrapping flower stems at weddings, making ribbon boot backdrops and barn awnings, making ribbon rosettes, sewing to flat tops，but also DIY into beautiful hair bands, hair accessories, bow hair Rope,balloons decoration, etc. Can be woven into your own unique bridal bracelet, bridesmaid wristband corsage, souvenir strap, brooch, graduation ribbon lei, pet decoration, etc。

Warm Tips：Both ends of the cut Satin ribbon need to be sealed to prevent fraying and loosening. Just sweep the ends of the ribbon over the candlelight and you're done.If you have any questions or dissatisfaction with the product, please contact us at any time。
